title: ocotea kostermansiana
intro: Ocotea kostermansiana, also known as the Kosterman's pepper tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae. It is native to the tropical forests of Papua New Guinea. The medicinal properties of Ocotea kostermansiana include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving respiratory health, and it is often used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, tinctures, and teas.
